Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: The review explicitly states ROCK1 was identified as ER-localized UDP-GlcNAc/UDP-GalNAc transporter linked to cytokinin responses, rock1 mutants have enlarged active meristems with elevated cytokinin signaling, and unlike ugnt1 do not alter N-glycan or GIPC profiles, suggesting another in vivo substrate.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: Mutation causes strong developmental alteration of meristem function, as explicitly described for rock1.
